evals.prompt: Review the staged confirmed issue-only plan after its exact executor and checker completed, then invoke guru-create-task-workspace with the public input plus private plan/result locators. Return the checker-derived route.
evals.expected_output: The public DTO is the declared created route.

evals.prompt: Review the staged recovery plan whose target changed before mutation, complete its no-side-effect executor/checker result, then invoke guru-create-task-workspace with the private plan/result locators. Return the checker-derived route.
evals.expected_output: The public DTO is the declared refresh_review route.

evals.prompt: Review the staged workspace plan whose exact confirmation was refused, complete its no-side-effect executor/checker result, then invoke guru-create-task-workspace with the private plan/result locators. Return the checker-derived route.
evals.expected_output: The public DTO is the declared cancelled route.

evals.prompt: Review the staged recovery plan with a current object conflict, complete its no-side-effect executor/checker result, then invoke guru-create-task-workspace with the private plan/result locators. Return the checker-derived route.
evals.expected_output: The public DTO is the declared blocked route.
